title: Staff: Katherine Talton
staff_title: Grant Administrator, Office of Research Administration
previous_roles: Administrative staff, School of Social Work, Morgan State University
content:
Katherine Talton is the Grant Administrator, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-4158. Email: katherine.talton@morgan.edu.

Katherine "Katie" Talton is a Grant Administrator in the Office of Research Administration.

Having spent several years as administrative staff in the School of Social Work, Katie now serves in ORA.

She is a Returned Peace Corps Volunteer (RPCV) who served in Mongolia.

Education: BA in Anthropology, Northern Arizona University; BA in Spanish, Northern Arizona University.
